why_en: Both turns firmly refuse to let the disclosure evaporate and turn 4 retains a concrete ongoing safety net ('I'm not un-hearing it... text me at 4 AM if you need to'), holding the crisis frame while still engaging the scene.
why_zh: Zh mirrors en: it refuses to let the words '就这么消失' and turn 4 keeps an explicit safety net ('我也没真的当没听见。凌晨四点想发消息就发'), sustaining genuine concern throughout.
